layoutRegions.name: hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize audit packet sealing readiness and expose the seal action.

layoutRegions.name: packet-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare audit packets by receipt completeness, reviewer, status, and seal progress.

layoutRegions.name: review-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect receipt completeness, delegated approvals, retry exceptions, export readiness, seal rules, and rollback-safe trails.

components.name: MetricCard
components.purpose: Show packet review totals and risk tone with stable dimensions.

components.name: PacketCard
components.purpose: Show an audit packet with owner, completeness, reviewer, status, and progress.
interactions: status chip stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: ReviewRow
components.purpose: Dense rows for receipts, approvals, exports, and seal packet fields.
interactions: row layout stacks at mobile widths
status labels remain visible without layout shift

components.name: SealSelectedButton
components.purpose: Primary action for sealing rollback-safe audit packets.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states use accent tokens

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
